channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: DSS arrests arms couriers linked to Papiri school abduction in Niger State
item.description: The Department of State Services (DSS) has arrested five suspects believed to be involved in supplying arms to the gunmen who carried out the mass abduction at St Mary’s Catholic School in Papiri vill...

item.title: Popovic announces Socceroos 26-man World Cup squad with Boyle missing out
item.description: Australia’s Socceroos coach, Tony Popovic, has named his final 26-man squad for the 2026 FIFA World Cup, with some tough decisions along the way. Veteran forward Martin Boyle, who qualifies for Austra...

item.title: Trump appoints Tom Barrack to Middle East envoy role amid criticism over past associations
item.description: Former President Donald Trump is encountering criticism from within his MAGA base after appointing Tom Barrack, a longtime friend and fundraiser previously charged and acquitted of acting as an unregi...

item.title: U.S. closes loophole allowing Nvidia AI chips to reach Chinese subsidiaries abroad
item.description: The U.S. Department of Commerce has issued new guidance to prevent companies from exporting advanced Nvidia and AMD AI chips to Chinese entities, even if they are located outside China. This measure c...

item.title: Food and Beverage Companies Urge Government to Ease Taxes and Support Industry Growth
item.description: The Association of Food, Beverage, and Tobacco Employers (AFBTE) don raise alarm say government dey scatter plenty taxes and arbitrary levies for food and beverage sector, wey fit affect survival of c...

item.title: Olawepo-Hashim secures Accord Party presidential ticket for 2027
item.description: Dr. Gbenga Olawepo-Hashim has been confirmed as the Accord Party’s presidential candidate for the 2027 general election after the party completed its affirmation process across several states. The exe...

item.title: How group dynamics make anger spread and intensify in crowds and online communities
item.description: The article explores how anger can spread rapidly within crowds and group settings, transforming individual behaviour in ways that would be unlikely in isolation. It opens with the author’s personal e...

item.title: Kevin Hassett faces criticism after comments on credit card delinquencies in Fox News interview
item.description: Kevin Hassett, director of the U.S. National Economic Council, drew widespread criticism following remarks he made during a Fox News Sunday interview regarding the financial condition of American hous...

item.title: How Parity Shapes the NHL Stanley Cup Final
item.description: The Stanley Cup final this year features the Carolina Hurricanes facing off against the Vegas Golden Knights. While the matchup itself is solid, it lacks the star power and widespread excitement seen ...

item.title: Court orders removal of Trump’s name from Kennedy Center amid ongoing legal and institutional disputes
item.description: A recent court ruling has ordered that Donald Trump’s name be removed from the John F. Kennedy Center for the Performing Arts, including its building signage and branding. The decision, issued by U.S....

item.title: Arsenal fan attacked in Paris following Champions League final amid widespread fan violence
item.description: Following Arsenal's heartbreaking defeat to PSG in the Champions League final, a lone Arsenal supporter in Paris was subjected to harassment and physical aggression by a group of PSG fans. Wearing a r...

item.title: WHO Director-General visits Ebola outbreak epicentre in the Democratic Republic of Congo to assess response efforts
item.description: The Director-General of the World Health Organization (WHO), Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus, travelled to the Democratic Republic of Congo (DRC) to visit the epicentre of an ongoing Ebola outbreak. The vi...

item.title: Australian housing market softens as global political and health developments unfold
item.description: A live national news update from Australia reports a broad mix of domestic economic shifts and significant international developments. In the property sector, new research indicates that price growth ...

item.title: NPA withdraws urgent court bid over arrest warrants in taxi boss Sibanyoni case
item.description: The National Prosecuting Authority (NPA) has confirmed that an urgent court application aimed at stopping the execution of arrest warrants in the case involving taxi boss Madoda Johannes Sibanyoni and...

item.title: South-West Fulani leaders deny involvement in kidnapping, call for individual accountability
item.description: The leadership of Fulani communities in South-West Nigeria has publicly distanced itself from recent kidnapping allegations linked to some arrests in Ogun State. In a statement issued on Sunday, the C...

item.title: Australia edge Blitzboks in dramatic Valladolid Sevens final after late TMO intervention
item.description: The Blitzboks suffered a dramatic defeat in the Valladolid Sevens final in Spain, losing 26-19 to Australia after a last-minute try was disallowed by the Television Match Official (TMO). South Africa,...

item.title: U.S. Teachers’ Union Proposes Limits on AI Tools and Screen Time in Early Education
item.description: The American Federation of Teachers (AFT), the second-largest teachers’ union in the United States, has released a comprehensive 10-point plan aimed at reducing the use of artificial intelligence tool...

item.title: Trump Says He Scored Perfectly on Cognitive Screening Test Amid Debate Over Results
item.description: President Donald Trump claimed he achieved a perfect score on a recent cognitive screening test taken during his annual medical examination at Walter Reed National Military Medical Center on May 26. I...

item.title: Fire Displaces Over 50 Families in Parañaque City
item.description: A devastating fire in Parañaque City left more than 50 families without homes, highlighting the vulnerability of residential areas in the city. The incident reportedly started in a densely populated a...

item.title: Review: Russell T Davies’s Tip Toe tackles social issues with strong performances
item.description: Russell T Davies’s latest drama, Tip Toe, opens with a striking and disturbing scene that sets the tone for the series. The story follows Clive, an electrician, and his family as they navigate persona...
